human_curated.introduction: Qashivo is an intelligent accounts receivable and debt recovery platform that automates your collections process using AI and machine learning. The system learns from every interaction to optimize communication strategies, improving cash flow and reducing days sales outstanding (DSO).
human_curated.architecture: The system is built on three key pillars: Data Integration Layer (connects to Xero), AI Decision Engine (analyzes customer behavior), and Communication Gateway (orchestrates multi-channel outreach)

core_features.name: Multi-Channel Communication
core_features.description: Email, SMS, WhatsApp, and AI voice calls

human_curated.introduction: The customer rating system categorizes payment behavior to optimize collection strategies.
human_curated.rationale: The weighted approach prioritizes the factors that most accurately predict future payment behavior and cash flow impact.

auto_updatable.calculation_formula: Total Score = (Payment Timing × 0.35) + (Payment Reliability × 0.30) + (Response Rate × 0.20) + (Dispute History × 0.15)

weighting_breakdown.description: Average days to pay relative to due date

human_curated.introduction: Every customer has an AI learning profile that tracks channel effectiveness and optimizes future communications.
human_curated.rationale: The 80/20 weighting prevents drastic changes from single events while allowing gradual adaptation to changing customer behavior.

human_curated.introduction: Collection workflows are predefined sequences of actions that automatically execute based on invoice status and customer behavior.

schedule_logic: Check invoice status (overdue or pending with due date < current date)
Identify next action based on days overdue
Prevent duplicates (check minimum gap since last action)
Verify no payment received (via Xero sync or Stripe webhook)
payment_verification: Xero Sync: Invoice status refreshed every 15 minutes
Stripe Webhook: Immediate notification on payment
Manual Marking: Users can mark invoices as paid
Partial Payments: System adjusts outstanding amount

human_curated.introduction: Qashivo uses SendGrid for reliable email delivery with comprehensive tracking capabilities.

auto_updatable.effectiveness_formula: Email Effectiveness = (Successful Outcomes / Total Emails Sent) × 100
successful_outcomes: Payment received within 7 days of email

human_curated.introduction: Text-based messaging for immediate customer engagement via Vonage.

delivery_process: Template Selection: AI selects optimal message template
Vonage API Call: Message sent with delivery tracking
Response Tracking: Webhook captures delivery status and replies
auto_updatable.effectiveness_calculation: SMS Effectiveness = (Payment Actions + Engagement Actions) / Total SMS Sent × 100

human_curated.introduction: AI-powered phone conversations for complex collection scenarios using Retell AI.

call_workflow: Call Initiation: System dials using Retell API with customer context
Conversation Flow: AI explains purpose, handles objections, negotiates
Outcome Capture: Promise recorded, disputes logged, transcript saved
auto_updatable.outcome_measurement: Call Effectiveness = (Successful Calls / Total Calls Made) × 100

human_curated.introduction: Communication modes are safety controls that determine whether and how the system sends automated messages.
human_curated.rollout_process: Recommended: Comms Off (setup) → Testing (validation) → Soft Live (pilot) → Live (production)

mode_definitions.name: Comms Off
mode_definitions.behavior: No communications sent. Actions created but blocked.
mode_definitions.use_case: System setup, testing workflows, importing data

mode_definitions.name: Testing
mode_definitions.behavior: Communications generated but not sent. Actions logged as 'test'.
mode_definitions.use_case: Validating templates, checking triggers, reviewing AI decisions

mode_definitions.name: Soft Live
mode_definitions.behavior: Communications sent ONLY to test contacts. Real customers blocked.
mode_definitions.use_case: Final testing with real delivery before full launch

mode_definitions.name: Live
mode_definitions.behavior: Full system operation. All communications sent to customers.

enforcement_rules: Recipient substitution in Soft Live mode
Full activity logging for all modes

human_curated.introduction: Real-time data synchronization with your accounting platform via OAuth 2.0.

oauth_flow: User clicks 'Connect Xero' → redirected to Xero login
Tokens securely stored, encrypted at rest

human_curated.introduction: Secure online payment collection with Stripe Checkout and automated reconciliation.
human_curated.security_details: PCI DSS Level 1 certified. Qashivo never stores or sees card numbers. All data encrypted in transit (TLS 1.2+).

payment_flow: Stripe Checkout Session created for invoice amount
Secure, time-limited URL generated (24 hour validity)
Link embedded as 'Pay Now' button in email/SMS
Stripe processes payment with 3D Secure if needed
Success: customer redirected to confirmation page
reconciliation_process: Payment recorded in Xero via API
